chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-208 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 06-08-2024 Mr. Mian Mumtaz Rabbani, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Parmanand, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G-Sindh a/w Asif Kalwar, Mukhtiarkar, Salehpat. ***** After hearing both the sides as well as concerned Mukhtiarkar, this petition is disposed of with directions to the Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur (respondent No.2) to decide pending application of the petitioner in accordance with law after hearing both the parties and pass speaking order within one month. Learned counsel for respondent No.4 adds that private respondents No.4&5 have since expired and he requests that legal heirs of said respondents should also be called by the concerned Deputy Commissioner before passing final order. Order accordingly. Office to send a copy of this order to AAG’s office for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
